title: Issue with Hours Diff formula
excerpt: Hi there! I was reading about how to properly use the Hours Diff formula, but no matter what I try, I get an error message and the formula does not work or calculate. I have a board for event agenda items, so each item h…

posts.author: Ddasilva (Deirdre Da Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there! I was reading about how to properly use the Hours Diff formula, but no matter what I try, I get an error message and the formula does not work or calculate. I have a board for event agenda items, so each item has a start time and end time Hours column. I also want to include an Hours Diff column so that I can calculate the duration of the item. However, when I plug in the two columns that I need, I get error messages. I am putting in the following: HOURS_DIFF({End Time}{Start Time}) and have tried it all sorts of diff ways. Please help!

Screen Shot 2021-07-06 at 1.28.59 PM1424×307 26.7 KB

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Ddasilva,

You just need a comma separating the column names:

 HOURS_DIFF({End Time}, {Start Time})

posts.author: Ddasilva (Deirdre Da Silva)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you! That did the trick! I thought for some reason I had tried that in my earlier attempts, but clearly not! Thank you for your help! I am all set now and it is working perfectly.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
